candidates.why: Explicit main top-line revenue; matches total sales and has full series of values.
Includes revenue plus other income; broader than pure sales so used only as fallback to the primary 'Revenue' line.

variables.notes: Use the explicit 'Revenue' line as the primary top-line sales measure; it matches the definition of REVT best.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Direct production and distribution costs; clearly labeled as raw materials and related costs, typical COGS equivalent.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Restructuring charges embedded in COGS; conceptually part of COGS but smaller and more special-item in nature.
Operating overhead, not direct production costs; more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight

variables.notes: Main COGS proxy is 'Raw materials, energy costs and freight'; restructuring sub-line is excluded to avoid double counting and because PROF typically uses the primary cost-of-sales bucket.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type label covering selling and administrative overhead costs; core SG&A component.
Material recurring operating overhead expenses; appropriate SG&A component excluding COGS and D&A.
Classic selling expense that is part of SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in other operating espense
candidates.why: Restructuring charges classified within other operating expenses; treated as part of SG&A-type overhead.
Another SG&A-type bucket; though values are not shown in preview, label clearly indicates operating overhead.
Share-based compensation is typically classified within SG&A; label explicitly indicates that cost type.

final_choice.row_label: Restructuring costs in other operating espense

variables.notes: Selected multiple SG&A-related component lines (selling/admin, other operating expenses, advertising, restructuring in other operating expenses, generic other operating expense, and share-based compensation) and excluded any totals or balancing items per instructions. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Advertising expense

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; matches XRD definition directly.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment of R&D; not a period expense, so only a fallback if P&L line were missing.
Balance sheet development cost asset; not the current period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Use the explicit income statement R&D expense line; balance sheet R&D-related lines are not needed for XRD.

candidates.why: Pure interest expense line; best representation of recurring interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
candidates.why: Net finance cost including interest; good fallback when the pure interest expense line may be missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Interest on capital financing; relevant component of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Similar to 'Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross'; may cover other periods under a slightly different label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; subset of total interest expense, useful if main lines are missing for some periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; potential alternative label in some years.
Interest component related to pension obligations; another interest-type cost that may be needed when other lines are missing.
Interest capitalized rather than expensed; not to be used as interest expense itself, but considered during review.
Derivative instrument on balance sheet, not an interest expense line; excluded from final mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: start with the pure 'Interest expense' line, then broader net finance costs and then specific interest components (capital financing, leases, pensions). Capitalized interest and non-controlling interest lines are intentionally excluded.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Equity attributable to owners/parent; explicitly excludes non-controlling interests, ideal for BE.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interests; only needed if parent-only equity were absent.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Use parent-only equity to avoid double counting non-controlling interests, which are mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary source for minority interest in equity.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; may be populated in some periods.
Income statement allocation of profit to NCI; not an equity stock measure but confirms presence of minority interests.
Same as above, income statement attribution to minority interests.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet non-controlling interests (and its alternate label) as the equity component MIB; income statement NCI lines are not used for the stock measure.
